title: sphaeralcea rusbyi
intro: Sphaeralcea rusbyi, also known as Rusby's globemallow, is a flowering plant in the mallow family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Sphaeralcea rusbyi include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, salve, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications to treat skin conditions and promote healthy skin.
